title: Mellow Roasted Italian Pork Bigoli
description: A paleo-friendly Italian dish featuring roasted pork bigoli with a glassy-jelly sauce made with Thai red curry paste, served in a stone bowl over a binchotan grill.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to medium-high heat.
Season the pork shoulder with salt and black pepper.
Roast the pork shoulder in the grill for 20 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
While the pork is cooking, cook the bigoli pasta according to package instructions.
In a small saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the Thai red curry paste, stirring constantly for 1 minute.
Add the coconut milk to the saucepan and stir to combine, bringing the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 5 minutes, or until it has thickened into a glassy-jelly consistency.
Slice the roasted pork into thin strips and serve over the cooked bigoli pasta, topping with the curry sauce and chopped fresh basil.
